emotion_and_tone: Friendly, motivating, trustworthy, playful but organized.

cards.style: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 p-6 md:p-8

buttons.primary: bg-sky-500 text-white rounded-full font-bold px-6 py-3 hover:bg-sky-600 active:scale-95 transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.bucks: bg-amber-500 text-white rounded-full font-bold px-6 py-3 hover:bg-amber-600 active:scale-95 transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border-2 border-slate-200 rounded-full font-bold px-6 py-3 hover:border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all active:scale-95

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-2 border-slate-200 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-sky-500 transition-colors

badges.earn: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-sm font-bold
badges.spend: bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-sm font-bold

images.description: Children playing playground - for parent/admin landing page hero
Gold coins - can be used as a graphic element in the 'Bucks' balance card
Teacher lecturing students - for admin dashboard welcome state

dashboard_student.layout: Mobile-first, huge balance card at the top with a massive amber text (e.g., text-6xl), floating QR code button for quick scan. Bottom navigation for Leaderboard and History.

dashboard_admin.layout: Sidebar navigation. Top 'Control Room' style bento grid for quick stats (Total Bucks, Total Members). Main area contains Shadcn table for members, and a 'Quick Log' widget for fast manual transaction entry. Dedicated 'Scanner' page accessible via prominent nav link.

dashboard_parent.layout: Clean cards per child. Shows child avatar/initials, current balance, and recent transaction feed. Simple, transparent, minimal interactive elements.

scanner_station.layout: Full screen optimized for iPad/Mobile. Camera viewfinder takes up 60% of the screen. Bottom area has large number pad or quick '+10', '+50', '-20' bucks buttons.

animations.page_transitions: framer-motion fade in and slide up (initial opacity 0, y 20)
animations.balance_update: Counter animation for numbers (e.g. going from 100 to 120 bucks) to add gamification feel.
animations.hover_states: Soft lift and shadow expansion on all interactive cards and buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind classes. Include 'Nunito' and 'DM Sans' via Google Fonts.
Do not use generic Inter font for headings.
Implement lucide-react icons with a bold stroke (strokeWidth={2.5}) for a friendlier look.
Build Shadcn UI components but heavily round them (rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl) to match the 'Vibrant Play' theme.
Ensure the scan station is highly responsive and uses a reliable QR code scanner library.
For the leaderboard, use a colorful stacked list where top 3 have gold/silver/bronze highlights.
CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' on all interactive and key informational elements.
